perturbation.original_text: This Agreement is the complete and exclusive statement of the agreement between the Parties and supersedes any and all other agreements, if any, between the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and contains all of the covenants and agreements between the Parties with respect thereto. This Agreement contains the entire understanding between the Parties and supersedes all prior collateral communications, if any, regarding the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement is *not* the complete and exclusive statement of the agreement between the Parties and *does not* supersede any and all other agreements, if any, between the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and *does not* contain all of the covenants and agreements between the Parties with respect thereto. This Agreement *does not* contain the entire understanding between the Parties and *does not* supersede all prior collateral communications, if any, regarding the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.explanation: This change negates the entire integration clause. By explicitly stating that the agreement is *not* complete and exclusive, it opens the door for prior agreements and communications to be considered, directly contradicting the initial assertion of the section itself. This contradicts the meaning of Section 11, leaving uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement is the complete and exclusive statement of the agreement between the Parties and supersedes any and all other agreements, if any, between the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and contains all of the covenants and agreements between the Parties with respect thereto. This Agreement contains the entire understanding between the Parties and supersedes all prior collateral communications, if any, regarding the subject matter hereof. This Agreement shall govern all communications between the Parties that are made during the period from the effective date of this Agreement to the date on which either party receives from the other written notice that subsequent communications shall not be so governed. No modification or amendment of this Agreement and no waiver of the terms and conditions hereof, in whole or in part, shall be binding, except by a written agreement signed by the Parties.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly negates the original integration clause by stating that the agreement is *not* complete and exclusive. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which affirms that the agreement *is* complete and exclusive and supersedes all prior agreements. The change opens the door for prior agreements to be considered, making the contradicted section, which prohibits this, unenforceable.

perturbation.original_text: Except as otherwise provided in paragraph 8 above, this Agreement and all obligations of the parties hereunder, notwithstanding anything to the contrary that may be contained herein, shall terminate one (1) year from the date of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Except as otherwise provided in paragraph 8 above, this Agreement and all obligations of the parties hereunder, notwithstanding anything to the contrary that may be contained herein, shall terminate one (1) year from the date of this Agreement. *However, this agreement shall remain in effect indefinitely*.
perturbation.explanation: This adds a clause directly contradicting the stated termination date. The statement "However, this agreement shall remain in effect indefinitely" after specifying a one-year termination creates a clear in-text contradiction. This affects section 14, since it is not clear if it ends in a year, or will last indefinitley.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as otherwise provided in paragraph 8 above, this Agreement and all obligations of the parties hereunder, notwithstanding anything to the contrary that may be contained herein, shall terminate one (1) year from the date of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds "However, this agreement shall remain in effect indefinitely" to a clause that specifies the agreement terminates in one year. This directly contradicts the original one-year termination clause, creating a strong in-text contradiction. The contradicted text, which is the same as the original text, states a clear termination date, and the change introduces an indefinite term, making the contract terms unclear and contradictory, as defined by structural flaws in text contradiction

perturbation.original_text: The Parties will cause their Representatives to observe the terms of this letter agreement, and they will be responsible for any breach of this agreement by any of their Representatives.
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties will cause their Representatives to observe the terms of this letter agreement, and they will *not* be responsible for any breach of this agreement by any of their Representatives.
perturbation.explanation: The inserted 'not' directly contradicts the original statement. It creates an internal inconsistency within Section 1, as it initially asserts responsibility for the Representatives' actions, then immediately negates that responsibility. This in-text contradiction renders Section 1 partially uninterpretable, as the liability for breaches is uncertain.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Parties and their Representatives (i) will keep the Information strictly confidential and will not (except as required by applicable law, regulation or legal process, and only after compliance with paragraph 2 below), without the prior written consent of the other party, disclose any Information in any manner whatsoever, and (ii) will not use any Information other than in connection with the Transaction; provided, however , that the Parties may reveal the Information to their Representatives (a) who need to know the Information for the purpose of evaluating the Transaction, (b) who are informed by the Parties of the confidential nature of the Information and are provided with a copy of this Agreement, (c) who agree not to disclose any of the Information to any other party and (d) who agree to act in accordance with the terms of this letter agreement to the same extent as if they were parties hereto. The Parties will cause their Representatives to observe the terms of this letter agreement, and they will be responsible for any breach of this agreement by any of their Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text states the Parties *will* be responsible for breaches by their Representatives. The changed text states the Parties will *not* be responsible. This creates a clear and direct conflict, specifically within the 'Contradicted Text' where the original clause assigning responsibility exists. The change undermines the confidentiality obligations by removing the accountability for the Representatives' actions regarding confidential information. This aligns with the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: No single or partial exercise thereof will preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right hereunder or otherwise legally available.
perturbation.changed_text: No single or partial exercise thereof *will* preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right hereunder or otherwise legally available.
perturbation.explanation: The change in the inserted word from "will not" to "will" directly contradicts the original statement. It creates an internal inconsistency within Section 10, as it initially asserts that the exercise of a right does not prevent the exercise of another right, then immediately states that it does. This renders the entire phrase uninterpretable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Parties hereby acknowledge that neither the failure nor delay by any party in exercising any right, power or privilege existing in connection with this Agreement shall operate or be construed to be a waiver of such right, power or privilege. No single or partial exercise thereof will preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right hereunder or otherwise legally available. No waiver hereunder shall be considered valid or enforceable, except by a written agreement signed by the Parties and no such waiver shall be deemed a waiver of any subsequent instance or circumstance of the same or similar nature.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that 'No single or partial exercise thereof will preclude any other or further exercise thereof...', meaning exercising a right does not prevent exercising another. The changed text alters this to 'No single or partial exercise thereof *will* preclude any other or further exercise thereof...', meaning it *does* prevent exercising another right. This directly contradicts the same sentence in the contradicted text, which asserts the opposite, creating a strong in-text contradiction. The perturbation explanation clearly points out the internal inconsistency.

perturbation.original_text: The Parties hereby acknowledge that, unless and until a definitive agreement between COMPANY and COMSYS with respect to any Transaction has been executed and delivered, neither the COMPANY nor COMSYS will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction and hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) in connection with any Transaction.
perturbation.changed_text: The Parties hereby acknowledge that, unless and until a definitive agreement between COMPANY and COMSYS with respect to any Transaction has been executed and delivered, neither the COMPANY nor COMSYS will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction and *do not* waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) in connection with any Transaction.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'hereby waive' to 'do not waive' directly contradicts the explicit waiver of claims. It creates an in-text contradiction because it states there is no legal obligation while simultaneously stating parties *do not* waive their right to bring claims, implying that a legal obligation could still arise. This affects Section 5 as it creates doubt whether this agreement can hold up in legal disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Parties hereby acknowledge that, unless and until a definitive agreement between COMPANY and COMSYS with respect to any Transaction has been executed and delivered, neither the COMPANY nor COMSYS will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction and hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) in connection with any Transaction. In addition, neither Party will be under any obligation to negotiate a definitive agreement, by virtue of this or any written or oral expression, discussion or negotiation with respect to such Transaction by any or either of the Representatives of the Parties except, in the case of this Agreement, for the matters specifically agreed to herein. 2
perturbation.justification: The original text includes an explicit waiver of claims related to any transaction prior to a definitive agreement. The changed text removes this waiver, stating that the parties 'do not waive' such claims. This creates a direct contradiction within the document, as it both asserts and denies the waiver of claims. The contradicted text is the same as the original text, re-emphasizing the initial waiver. By negating the waiver, the modified text introduces a clear inconsistency that would make it difficult to enforce the provision, thus it is a structural flaw that causes an in-text contradiction.
